title: notandvm's spanish moss!
description: adjusts the saturation & coloring of biomes o' plenty's spanish moss to be a bit less straining on the eyes! (and look better overall)
body:
##
REQUIRES [BIOMES O' PLENTY](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)


![An image showcasing Biomes O' Plenty's bayou biome, with the focus being the retexture of the mod's spanish moss to be less saturated and slightly darker.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2613ecb8011ec9a95c3d71bf048b055ee3e79b3d.png) ###
a simple resource pack that desaturates & hue shifts the spanish moss from bop's bayou biome!

i've never really liked how the texture looks alongside the rest of the biome, as simply put it's just flat out ugly to look at and really strains the eyes at a distance. not to mention the color really doesn't look much like what it's supposed to emulate, at least to me - i never even knew it was supposed to be spanish moss at first!

this retexture looks especially nice with shaders (check the gallery!), as often the effects applied by shaders make the default moss coloring brutally stand out in a way that makes the issues with the texture worse.

enjoy!
